ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polling_data" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll entry */,
  "mid_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was conducted */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster who conducted the poll */,
  "biden_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting Biden */,
  "trump_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting Trump */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory expressed as a string */,
  "start_end_date" TEXT /* Start and end date of the polling period */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll data was released or entered */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Statistical margin of error */,
  "polling_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling method used */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_polling_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("polling_method_id") REFERENCES polling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES polling_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the pollster */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the pollster */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year when the election took place */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, midterm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election period */,
  "winning_candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party the candidate belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* Campaign website URL */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollster associated with the trend */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate associated with the trend */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election associated with the trend */,
  "average_percentage" REAL /* Average polling percentage for the candidate */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend analysis */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_trends_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_trends_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_trends_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll data */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polling_data ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling method (e.g., telephone, online survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polling method */,
  "accuracy_rate" REAL /* Historical accuracy rate of the polling method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., presidential, gubernatorial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_level" INTEGER /* Level of the category in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES polling_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polling_data ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, comparative analysis) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
